exec jjw config init
exec jjw create feature-x
stderr 'Creating workspace "feature-x" from "main"'
stderr 'Creating bookmark "feature-x"'
stderr 'Workspace "feature-x" created successfully'
exists workspaces/feature-x/.jj
exists .jjw/workspaces/feature-x/created-at
exists .jjw/workspaces/feature-x/index
